project_type: Full-stack AI video generation app with FastAPI backend and React frontend
build_system: pip install -e '.[dev]' for backend, npm for frontend, docker-compose for full stack
test_framework: pytest with pytest-asyncio (asyncio_mode=auto) for backend, vitest for frontend
build_command: cd backend && pip install -e '.[dev]' && cd ../frontend && npm install && npm run build
verification_instructions: 1. Run pytest tests/ -v in backend to verify all tests pass. 2. Run npm run build in frontend to verify TypeScript compiles. 3. Optionally docker compose build for full-stack validation.
setup_instructions: 1. pip install -e '.[dev]' in backend/ 2. npm install in frontend/
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. Python 3.11, Node.js 22 pre-installed. FFmpeg needed for video assembly.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits (feat:, fix:, docs:, etc.). Feature branches. Real implementations only - no mocks or placeholders.
key_patterns: Backend: FastAPI routers in app/routers/, services in app/services/, Pydantic schemas in app/models/schemas.py, config via pydantic-settings in app/config.py. Frontend: React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, types in src/types/index.ts, API client in src/api/client.ts, hooks pattern in src/hooks/, components in src/components/. Video assembly uses MoviePy with write_videofile in asyncio.to_thread. TTS via edge-tts. Media sourcing via httpx async client with semaphore-limited concurrency.
directory_structure: Root: docker-compose.yml, .env.example. backend/: FastAPI app with app/ (config, main, models/, routers/, services/) and tests/. frontend/: Vite+React app with src/ (api/, assets/, components/, hooks/, pages/, types/).
